rationale: All ACs satisfied: QueryStore trait + MemoryQueryStore with labeled entities, typed directed links, streaming scans/traversals via boxed iterators, by-id lookup, no axon-storage coupling, and four focused tests covering scans, lookup, and directional traversal.

findings.summary: QueryStore trait, EntityScan/LinkTraversal inputs, and streaming iterators are defined and re-exported from lib.rs; implementation has no dependency on axon-storage::StorageAdapter, satisfying the future-backend boundary.
MemoryQueryStore maintains directed outgoing/incoming link indexes keyed by entity id, enabling efficient traversal in all three Direction variants.

Tests cover label+property scan filtering, nested-property lookup by id, typed outgoing traversal with property filter, and incoming/Either traversal — minimal but sufficient store-level coverage per the bead's stated scope.
